description: Configure a DuckLake-backed DuckDB metadata store and preview the setup SQL.

events.stdout:
DuckLake store initialised
  Store class: DuckDBMetadataStore
  Database: /tmp/ducklake_demo.db
  Catalog backend: sqlite
  Storage backend: local

Preview of DuckLake setup SQL:
  01. CREATE OR REPLACE SECRET metaxy_generated_dev_ducklake ( TYPE DUCKLAKE, METADATA_PATH '/tmp/ducklake_meta.db', DATA_PATH '/tmp/ducklake_storage' );
  02. ATTACH IF NOT EXISTS 'ducklake:metaxy_generated_dev_ducklake' AS ducklake (OVERRIDE_DATA_PATH true);
  03. USE ducklake;

Running SHOW ALL TABLES after opening the store:
  Found 22 tables
   - ducklake_column
   - ducklake_column_mapping
   - ducklake_column_tag
   - ducklake_data_file
   - ducklake_delete_file
   - ducklake_file_column_stats
   - ducklake_file_partition_value
   - ducklake_files_scheduled_for_deletion
   ... and 14 more
